# Support

## Report issues

Use the issue forms in this repository:

- Bug report: include a minimal reproducible project.
- Feature request: describe the problem and proposed behavior.

## What to include in bug reports

- Addon name and addon version
- Construct version
- Exact repro steps
- Expected vs actual result
- Minimal repro project file or link
- Relevant logs/screenshots/video

Issues missing repro details may be labeled `needs-repro` until sufficient data is available.
